props.cellProps: Additional attributes spread on the cell `<g>` element. A `title` value renders as an SVG `<title>` child (native tooltip).
props.disabled: Renders the cell in a disabled when toggled off using interactive legend state.
props.item: Heatmap cell data. Exposes `value` and `color` for use in slot content.
props.x: Horizontal offset of the cell within the parent SVG.
props.y: Vertical offset of the cell within the parent SVG.

slots.default: Slot used to render custom content inside the cell via a `<foreignObject>`.
